meta.title: Mirosław Wandyk — Full-Stack Engineer · Portfolio
meta.description: Portfolio of Mirosław Wandyk — Full-Stack Engineer. E-commerce, mobile, PWA projects and more.

hero.subtitle: I build web applications with TypeScript, Next.js and Nest.js — from MedTech to e-commerce, with a focus on performance and 100/100 Lighthouse scores.

about.title: About me
about.p1: Full-Stack Engineer with ~2 years of commercial experience building production applications in TypeScript, Next.js and Nest.js. Working remotely from Myszyniec — currently at DanCorp (MedTech), previously Investimetric (SaaS, 500+ MAU).
about.p2: I optimize Core Web Vitals to 100/100 Lighthouse, integrate OAuth/Keycloak, Stripe and PostgreSQL. Below you'll find my projects — from full-stack e-commerce to mobile apps and PWA games.

projects.title: Projects
projects.hint: Hover a card to see the full description · on mobile — tap

mechaFront.title: MechaShop — Frontend
mechaFront.desc: Online store frontend built with React 19 and TypeScript, using Vite as the build tool. Tailwind CSS handles styling, React Router handles navigation. Full authentication via JWT and Google OAuth. Stripe powers payments. Unit tests (Vitest) and E2E tests (Playwright) ensure stability before deployment on Render.

mechaBack.title: MechaShop — Backend
mechaBack.backTitle: The heart of the online store
mechaBack.desc: Backend built on Nest.js with NeonDB (PostgreSQL). REST API complemented by GraphQL. Login/password plus OAuth authentication, JWT tokens. Stripe payments, image uploads via Cloudinary. Nest.js modular architecture makes it easy to extend the store with new features.

catalog.title: Online Store
catalog.desc: Application created in a three-person team where I served as technical lead. Next.js as the full-stack framework, MongoDB (NoSQL) as the database, Clerk for user authentication. Team coordination, code review and deployment on Vercel. Academic project with a real commercial-team workflow.

games.title: Games Database Mobile
games.desc: Mobile app in React Native / Expo for browsing games from the IGDB database (integrated with Twitch). Users can search titles, browse details and cover art. NativeWind (Tailwind for RN) provides a consistent design system. IGDB REST API, TypeScript end-to-end, preview via Expo Go.

bike.title: Bicycle Shop
bike.desc: Landing page designed from Figma mockups. Mobile-first approach — the page scales smoothly from smartphones through tablets to desktop. BEM methodology for readable CSS structure, SCSS for variables and mixins. Pure HTML/CSS/JS without frameworks — ideal for learning responsive layout and pixel-perfect implementation.

match3.title: Match-3 — PWA Game
match3.desc: Match-3 game built in Vue / Nuxt with TypeScript. Mobile-first — works on smartphones, tablets and desktop. Supabase (PostgreSQL) stores scores and player data. Tailwind CSS for UI, PWA enables installation on device. Game logic, match animations and responsive board grid — all in one app.
